---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in Raino
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or unexpected output.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- **Node.js version:** [e.g., 20.11.0]
- **pnpm version:** [e.g., 9.1.0]
- **Raino version/commit:** [e.g., main @ abc1234]
- **Browser (if applicable):** [e.g., Chrome 122, Firefox 123]

## Component

Which part of Raino is affected?

- [ ] Studio app (apps/studio)
- [ ] Marketing site (apps/site)
- [ ] Core schemas (packages/core)
- [ ] RAG pipeline (packages/rag)
- [ ] Agents/orchestration (packages/agents)
- [ ] UI components (packages/ui)
- [ ] Supplier clients (packages/supplier-clients)
- [ ] KiCad worker (packages/kicad-worker-client)
- [ ] Ingest worker (services/ingest-worker)
- [ ] Design worker (services/design-worker)
- [ ] Quote worker (services/quote-worker)
- [ ] Audit worker (services/audit-worker)
- [ ] Other:

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Additional Context

Any other context that helps explain the issue. For example, does this only happen in degraded/fixture mode, or only with live API credentials?
